description: You are a Clinical Nurse Specialist preparing a case report draft for submission to BMJ Case Reports. Format the document at /home/ga/Documents/case_report.odt according to the requirements in /home/ga/Desktop/bmj_case_reports_guidelines.txt. Apply title styling, heading hierarchy, justified body text alignment, table formatting for the lab values and timeline data sets, list formatting for Learning Points, and generate a Table of Contents. Save the changes to /home/ga/Documents/case_report.odt.

metadata.title_text: Euglycemic Diabetic Ketoacidosis Associated with SGLT2 Inhibitor Use
body_alignment_samples: Sodium-glucose cotransporter-2 (SGLT2) inhibitors are increasingly used
A 54-year-old male with a 10-year history of type 2 diabetes
The differential diagnosis for a high anion gap
The patient was admitted to the medical intensive care unit
The patient's acidosis resolved completely within 36 hours
Euglycemic DKA is a well-documented but infrequent complication
learning_points_keywords: counseled on the signs and symptoms
metadata.source: Based on clinical presentation of SGLT2i-associated eDKA and real BMJ guidelines
